assertions.assertion: Lists passkeys/WebAuthn/FIDO2 as a supported authentication method
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md authentication methods table lists 'Passkeys: WebAuthn/FIDO2 phishing-resistant'.

assertions.assertion: Lists TOTP (authenticator apps) as a supported method
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md lists 'TOTP: Authenticator apps (RFC 6238)' in the methods table.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that multiple authentication methods can coexist for the same user
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows 6 methods in the table implying coexistence, and recovery codes are 'Auto-generated during 2FA setup'.

assertions.assertion: Notes that OTP (email/SMS) is the default passwordless flow
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Core Principles states: 'passwordless-first — OTP email/SMS is the default flow' and the table marks OTP as '(default)'.
